title: Aja James Named Assistant Commissioner, DDS — mass.gov press release (2021-02-25)
description: Captured text of the official Commonwealth of Massachusetts (MassAbility / Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission) news release dated 2021-02-25 announcing Aja James as Assistant Commissioner, Disability Determination Services, effective 2021-03-07. Primary source establishing James's appointment date, her prior role (Director of Statewide Support Operations), her ~two-decade DDS tenure (joined ~2002 as a vocational disability examiner), her SEIU Local 509 steward / Chapter Board / Joint Executive Board service, Co-Chair of the Black Managers Committee, Suffolk University MPA, and a corroborating quote from MRC Commissioner Toni Wolf. Anchors the top of the DDS-Det Asst-Commissioner incumbent chain.

source.publisher: Commonwealth of Massachusetts — MassAbility (Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission)
source.title: Aja James Named Assistant Commissioner, Disability Determination Services

notes: Authoritative: a faithful firecrawl capture of the official mass.gov news release (primary government source). temporal_coverage = the publication date (2021-02-25); the announced effective date of the appointment is 2021-03-07 (stated in body). Boilerplate mass.gov header/footer/feedback chrome was carried into the capture and is not substantive. No columns/row_count — narrative markdown.
